expectations.text: Clears product-level filters via REMOVEFILTERS on 'Product'[Product]/[Subcategory]
Keeps 'Product'[Category] and external slicers (Year/Country); does not wipe them
expectations.evidence: Category NOT removed; Year/Country untouched. NOTE: also removes 'Product'[Color], so a Color slicer would be ignored in the denominator -- debatable design choice

expectations.text: Explains other slicers remain in filter context
expectations.evidence: 'filters coming from other tables (Date[Year], Customer[Country]) are untouched'
